body.title: Dynamic Shell App
body.subtitle: Content powered by your server — update anytime, no release needed.

body.text: This content was downloaded from your server at app launch. Edit home.json on the server to update this screen instantly.

items.title: Server-Driven UI
items.subtitle: All screens defined in JSON
items.description: Every component on every screen is described in a JSON file hosted on your server.

items.title: Delta Sync
items.subtitle: Only changed files download
items.description: The app compares SHA-256 hashes and only fetches files that have changed since the last sync.

items.title: Dynamic Theming
items.subtitle: Colors & typography from theme.json
items.description: The entire visual language of the app — colors, fonts, spacing — is controlled by theme.json.

items.title: Integrity Verified
items.subtitle: SHA-256 hash on every file
items.description: Every downloaded file is verified against its expected hash before being stored in cache.
